allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("D:\\MOBILE APP CAR SCHOOL\\Design mockups and prompt.zip"\); $zip.Entries | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize; $zip.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("D:\\MOBILE APP CAR SCHOOL\\Design mockups and prompt.zip"\); $entry = $zip.GetEntry\("Автошкола.dc.html"\); $stream = $entry.Open\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $content = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $content.Length; $content.Substring\(0, 3000\))
